query: Need to hook up our company's Snowflake warehouse to Luzmo so my dashboards can query the `analytics.public.orders` table directly. Where do I start?
I've got a 120k-row CSV of marketing leads I want to load into Luzmo. The createData endpoint says max 10k per call — how do I batch this?
Already have a Postgres account configured in Luzmo from a previous project. Don't want to create a duplicate — how do I list existing accounts and pick the right one?
We use a niche billing API (no native Luzmo connector). Want to build a plugin so Luzmo can query our billing data directly. Where are the endpoint specs?
My numeric column is a price but IQ formats it as a plain number. How do I tell Luzmo it's currency?
Need a derived column for `profit_margin = (revenue - cost) / revenue`. Where is that configured?
Datasets are slow on big aggregations. Can Warp acceleration help and how do I enable it?
Can you help me download all rows from a Luzmo dataset into a CSV file?
I want to build a custom chart type (a Sankey variant) that doesn't exist in Flex. How does the manifest/structure work?
What's the difference between createDataset, createData, and createDataprovider? Got confused after reading three different docs.
Need to embed a single Luzmo dashboard in a React page using LuzmoDashboardComponent and authKey/authToken.
Multi-tenant SaaS — each customer must only see their own rows. EmbedFilterGroup or token filters?
Trying to build a white-label editor with ACK. Configure→Store→Render mental model still confusing me.
Customize the look of our embedded dashboards to match our brand — primary color #0F172A, Inter font.
401 from createAuthorization in production. Env vars look set, region EU. What's the most likely cause?
Need a Python script to dissociate a dashboard from a dataset.
luzmo-iq-embed-chat returns wrong answers — usually picks the marketing dataset when users ask about finance.
Embedded dashboard goes blank when toggled to dark mode — chart darkens but container is still white.
How do I make end-users able to edit a dashboard themselves inside our SaaS UI?
Flex chart is showing 0 height with no error. Container has height 600px.
